## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, passwords, or local config files are committed
- [ ] Destructive runner operations remain dry-run or confirmation-gated
- [ ] Busy-runner protection is preserved or explicitly documented
- [ ] README/docs updated for user-facing changes
